title: Kinetically constrained chlorine Eh-pH diagram
initialCondition: Total chlorine starts in the fast pool Cl-, Cl2(aq), HOCl, and OCl-. The fast pool is distributed by pH-dependent acid-base/hydrolysis speciation and a redox accessibility factor tied to the existing OCl-/Cl- boundary.
thermodynamicTarget: The slow oxychlorine capacity is capped by the existing equilibrium alpha model computed from data/chlorine_half_reactions.json.
warning: Schematic kinetic visualization only. Rate constants are adjustable teaching parameters, not calibrated chlorine kinetics.
